heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 92–255, title I, § 10486 Stat. 67Mar. 21, 1972
label: 1121 to 1123 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 92–255, title I, § 10486 Stat. 67Mar. 21, 1972
notes: Section 1121, , , , provided for appointment of an acting Director until position was initially filled.Pub. L. 92–255, title II, § 21186 Stat. 69Mar. 21, 1972

Section 1122, , , , prohibited Director or any other Federal officer from waiving or disregarding any limitation or requirement prescribed by law with respect to any Federal program or activity.Pub. L. 92–255, title II, § 21386 Stat. 69Mar. 21, 1972
Section 1123, , , , provided for authorization of appropriations, and fiscal year availability of such appropriations.Pub. L. 92–255, title II, § 21486 Stat. 70Mar. 21, 1972
Effective Date of Repeal, prior to repeal by , , , provided for repeal of sections effective .Section 1104 of this titlePub. L. 94–237, § 4(c)(1)90 Stat. 244Mar. 19, 1976June 30, 1975
